name: Swamp Ghost
description: A spectral figure materializes from the mist, its ghostly form radiating malevolent energy!
ambient_description: The ghost glides toward you, its chilling touch reaching out through the fog.
victory_description: The ghost dissipates with an unearthly wail, fading back into the mist.
defeat_description: You flee from the spectral horror, its icy presence sapping your strength.
